reasoning: Apple maintains strong fundamentals with services growth offsetting hardware cyclicality, but faces significant regulatory headwinds (DOJ lawsuit, EU DMA) and China market pressure. AI initiatives (Apple Intelligence) could catalyze 2025-26 upgrade cycle, though execution risk remains. Valuation at ~28x forward earnings reflects premium positioning but limits upside without clear catalyst. Recommend neutral stance with monitoring of Q1 2025 earnings for AI adoption signals and regulatory developments.
